学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has been around 50th–60th in recent years, ranked 59th in 2026, stable at mid-to-upper level; 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus management incidents such as dormitory security checks, no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranked 41st (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high; no record of enrollment gaps; Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, which are related to Physics Category majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Clinical Medicine, enhancing the overall attractiveness of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other popular Physics Category majors are highly recommended with high social heat; Clinical Medicine, Stomatology are relatively hot; the total number of Gaokao candidates in the province in 2026 is 521,000, a significant increase from 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 380,000, an increase of about 46% from 260,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, and is a cross-provincial enrollment in Jiangsu, with no local student preference; in recent years, the Physics Category plan in Jiangsu has continued to expand, indicating the university's emphasis on Jiangsu students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as large fluctuations in historical rankings, a slight expansion of the Physics Category plan in 2026, a significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province, and high Douyin popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 36724th place, competition is expected to intensify; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 38071st place, with a range of 37571–38571.
